summary: Tested Batch Features: Mystery Box, Price Alerts (Schnäppchen-Alarm), Social Share (Teilen & Verdienen), PWA manifest, and Google OAuth. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements and data-testid attributes.

mystery_box_api.GET /api/mystery-box/active: PASS - Returns auctions array and tiers object
mystery_box_api.tiers_structure: PASS - All 4 tiers present (bronze, silver, gold, diamond)

price_alerts_api.POST /api/alerts/create: PASS - Validates product_id or auction_id required

social_share_api.GET /api/social/my-shares: PASS - Returns share history with total_bonus_earned
social_share_api.win_structure: PASS - Each win has auction_id, product, can_share, bonus_bids

pwa_manifest.GET /manifest.json: PASS - Valid JSON with all required PWA fields
pwa_manifest.name: PASS - 'BidBlitz'

google_oauth.POST /api/auth/google: PASS - Endpoint exists and validates session_id

frontend_mystery_box.Title: PASS - Shows 'Mystery Boxen'
frontend_mystery_box.Tier buttons: PASS - Shows Alle Stufen, Bronze, Silber, Gold, Diamant
frontend_mystery_box.Tier cards: PASS - Shows 4 tier cards with value ranges

frontend_social_share.Title: PASS - Shows 'Teilen & Verdienen'
frontend_social_share.Share buttons: PASS - Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp, Telegram buttons visible

critical_code_review_comments: mystery_box.py: Well-structured with 4 tiers, proper value ranges, admin endpoints for creating mystery auctions
price_alerts.py: Complete CRUD operations, trigger mechanism for price alerts, notification support (Telegram, email, push)
social_share.py: 3 bonus bids per share, 24h cooldown, supports Facebook/Twitter/WhatsApp/Telegram
auth.py: Google OAuth using Emergent Auth (https://auth.emergentagent.com), proper session_id validation
manifest.json: Valid PWA manifest with BidBlitz branding, shortcuts for Auktionen/Gebote kaufen/Dashboard
Login.js/Register.js: Google OAuth buttons with correct data-testid attributes and German text
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_batch_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for batch features

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages and components working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test user has 13 shareable wins, 320 bids balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch features fully tested. Mystery Box: 4 tiers (bronze €50-150, silver €150-400, gold €400-1000, diamond €1000-5000), no active auctions currently. Price Alerts: /alerts page shows 'Schnäppchen-Alarm', user has 0 alerts. Social Share: /share page shows 13 shareable wins with 3 bonus bids per share. Google OAuth: Buttons visible on /login and /register with correct German text, uses Emergent Auth. PWA: manifest.json valid with BidBlitz branding. All routes working: /mystery, /alerts, /share, /api/mystery-box/*, /api/alerts/*, /api/social/*, /api/auth/google.
